nation: Chippewas of Georgina Island First Nation
economic_notes: Nation operates Virginia Beach Marina, Nish Radio Inc., 2458582 Ontario Limited, 6832067 Canada Inc., Tobacco Trails, Daawegamig Lodge, Mnookmi Restaurant. Coldwater Narrows Trust ($88.9M settlement 2012) and Williams Treaty Trust ($155.6M settlement 2018) are major investment vehicles. Portfolio investments fair market value $167,173,014 (2021) vs $140,418,819 (2020). COVID-19 noted as ongoing but management assessed no significant financial impact.
